name: Novotel Okinawa Naha
address: 40 Matsugawa Naha, Naha, Okinawa Main island, Nhật Bản
description:
Khám phá Novotel Okinawa Naha - Khách sạn 4.5 sao tại đảo chính Okinawa, Nhật Bản

Với vị trí đắc địa tại đảo chính Okinawa, Novotel Okinawa Naha là một khách sạn 4.5 sao đáng chú ý. Với 328 phòng nghỉ sang trọng và tiện nghi, khách sạn này là điểm đến lý tưởng cho du khách muốn khám phá vẻ đẹp của Okinawa.

Khách sạn Novotel Okinawa Naha cung cấp dịch vụ nhận phòng từ 03:00 PM và quy định giờ trả phòng là 11:00 AM. Với thời gian nhận phòng và trả phòng linh hoạt, du khách có thể thoải mái sắp xếp lịch trình của mình mà không cần lo lắng về việc kiểm tra vào và ra khỏi khách sạn.

Khách sạn đã được cải tạo lại vào năm 2018, mang đến cho du khách trải nghiệm nghỉ ngơi tinh tế và hiện đại. Với tổng cộng 328 phòng nghỉ, Novotel Okinawa Naha đảm bảo sẽ có đủ chỗ cho khách hàng. Được thiết kế với sự chú trọng đến chi tiết và tiện nghi cao cấp, mỗi phòng nghỉ tại khách sạn đều mang đến không gian thoải mái và tiện lợi cho du khách.

Đặc biệt, chính sách trẻ em của khách sạn cho phép trẻ em từ 0 đến 15 tuổi ở miễn phí. Điều này là một lợi thế lớn cho các gia đình du lịch có trẻ nhỏ, giúp tiết kiệm chi phí và tạo điều kiện thuận lợi cho kỳ nghỉ của mọi người. Với những tiện ích và dịch vụ tuyệt vời, Novotel Okinawa Naha là một lựa chọn hàng đầu cho du khách khi ghé thăm Okinawa.

Tiện nghi giải trí tuyệt vời tại Novotel Okinawa Naha

Novotel Okinawa Naha là một khách sạn tuyệt vời tại đảo Okinawa, Nhật Bản, với nhiều tiện nghi giải trí độc đáo. Khách sạn này cung cấp một loạt các cửa hàng đa dạng, nơi bạn có thể mua sắm và tìm kiếm những món quà độc đáo. Hãy tìm hiểu về văn hóa địa phương và mang về những món đồ lưu niệm tại cửa hàng quà tặng/souvenir shop của khách sạn.

Ngoài ra, Novotel Okinawa Naha còn có một quầy bar đẹp mắt, nơi bạn có thể thư giãn và thưởng thức những loại đồ uống tuyệt vời. Quầy bar này không chỉ có không gian thoáng đãng và sang trọng, mà còn có một menu đa dạng với các loại cocktail, rượu và bia độc đáo. Hãy tận hưởng không gian thư giãn và thưởng thức những món đồ uống tuyệt hảo tại quầy bar của Novotel Okinawa Naha.

Nếu bạn muốn thư giãn và giảm căng thẳng, hãy tận hưởng dịch vụ massage tại khách sạn. Với đội ngũ nhân viên chuyên nghiệp và kỹ thuật cao, bạn sẽ được trải nghiệm những liệu pháp massage thư giãn và làm mới cơ thể. Hãy để bản thân thư giãn và tái tạo năng lượng tại Novotel Okinawa Naha.

Tiện nghi thể thao tại Novotel Okinawa Naha

Novotel Okinawa Naha tọa lạc trên đảo chính Okinawa, Nhật Bản và mang đến cho du khách một loạt tiện nghi thể thao tuyệt vời. Khách sạn có một trung tâm thể dục hiện đại, nơi du khách có thể tận hưởng các hoạt động thể thao và rèn luyện sức khỏe. Với trang thiết bị đầy đủ và chất lượng, du khách có thể tập luyện mọi lúc trong ngày, vì trung tâm thể dục mở cửa 24/7.

Ngoài ra, Novotel Okinawa Naha cũng có một hồ bơi ngoài trời tuyệt đẹp, nơi du khách có thể thư giãn và tận hưởng không gian xanh mát. Hồ bơi rộng lớn và được bao quanh bởi các ghế nằm thoải mái, tạo điều kiện lý tưởng để thư giãn sau một ngày dạo chơi và khám phá. Đặc biệt, trung tâm thể dục và hồ bơi ngoài trời tại Novotel Okinawa Naha đều miễn phí sử dụng cho khách hàng của khách sạn.

Tiện nghi tiện lợi tại Novotel Okinawa Naha

Novotel Okinawa Naha tọa lạc tại đảo Okinawa chính, Nhật Bản, với một loạt các tiện nghi tiện lợi để đáp ứng nhu cầu của du khách. Khách sạn cung cấp dịch vụ giặt ủi và dịch vụ phòng, giúp bạn có thể thư giãn và tận hưởng kỳ nghỉ của mình. Hộp đựng đồ cá nhân an toàn và dịch vụ lễ tân đều có sẵn để đảm bảo sự an toàn và thuận tiện cho khách hàng. Wi-Fi miễn phí tại các khu vực công cộng và khu vực được chỉ định hút thuốc giúp bạn kết nối và tiện lợi trong suốt thời gian lưu trú của mình. Dịch vụ giặt là và dịch vụ lưu trữ hành lý cũng được cung cấp để đáp ứng nhu cầu của khách hàng. Ngoài ra, khách sạn còn có cửa hàng tiện lợi, dịch vụ dọn phòng hàng ngày và phòng giặt tự động để mang đến sự tiện nghi và thoải mái cho khách hàng.

Tiện nghi vận chuyển tại Novotel Okinawa Naha

Novotel Okinawa Naha tọa lạc tại Okinawa Main island, Nhật Bản, với các tiện nghi vận chuyển đáng chú ý. Khách sạn cung cấp các tour du lịch để khám phá vẻ đẹp của đảo Okinawa. Ngoài ra, khách sạn cũng có bãi đậu xe và dịch vụ thuê xe, giúp du khách dễ dàng di chuyển trong khu vực. Nếu bạn không muốn tự lái, dịch vụ taxi cũng có sẵn để đưa đón bạn đến các điểm tham quan. Đặc biệt, khách sạn cũng có bãi đậu xe tự phục vụ, giúp khách hàng tự do đỗ xe mà không cần lo lắng về chỗ đậu. Tuy nhiên, cần lưu ý rằng có tính phí đậu xe áp dụng.

Tiện nghi ẩm thực tại Novotel Okinawa Naha

Novotel Okinawa Naha là một điểm đến lý tưởng cho những ai yêu thích ẩm thực đa dạng. Khách sạn này cung cấp nhiều tiện nghi ẩm thực đa dạng bao gồm cửa hàng cà phê, nhà hàng và dịch vụ phòng. Du khách có thể tận hưởng những ly cà phê thơm ngon tại cửa hàng cà phê, hoặc thưởng thức các món ăn ngon tại nhà hàng. Nếu bạn muốn tận hưởng bữa ăn trong không gian riêng tư, dịch vụ phòng của khách sạn sẽ đáp ứng mọi yêu cầu của bạn. 

Bên cạnh đó, Novotel Okinawa Naha còn cung cấp tiện nghi nướng BBQ cho khách hàng. Bạn có thể tổ chức bữa tiệc ngoài trời cùng gia đình và bạn bè, và thưởng thức những món ăn nướng thơm ngon. Đội ngũ nhân viên chuyên nghiệp của khách sạn sẽ đảm bảo rằng bạn có một trải nghiệm ẩm thực tuyệt vời. Ngoài ra, khách sạn cũng cung cấp dịch vụ dọn phòng hàng ngày và đồ ăn sáng tự chọn đa dạng, bao gồm các món ăn châu Âu.

Phòng Novotel Okinawa Naha: Lựa chọn đa dạng và giá tốt trên Agoda

Novotel Okinawa Naha tọa lạc tại đảo Okinawa, Nhật Bản và mang đến cho bạn một loạt các loại phòng đa dạng để lựa chọn. Phòng Deluxe Executive với 2 giường đơn - Không hút thuốc, bao gồm quyền truy cập vào khu vực tiếp khách: diện tích 34 mét vuông với 2 giường Semi Double-Beds. Phòng Deluxe - Twin Bed: diện tích 34 mét vuông với 2 giường Semi Double-Beds. Phòng Executive Twin - Không hút thuốc, bao gồm quyền truy cập vào khu vực tiếp khách: diện tích 24 mét vuông với 2 giường đơn. Phòng Standard - 1 giường đôi: diện tích 16 mét vuông với 1 giường đôi. Phòng Standard Twin Bed: diện tích 24 mét vuông với 2 giường đơn. 

Đặt phòng tại Novotel Okinawa Naha thông qua Agoda sẽ mang lại cho bạn những lợi ích tuyệt vời. Bạn sẽ được tận hưởng những giá tốt nhất và trải nghiệm đặt phòng dễ dàng và không gặp rắc rối. Agoda cam kết mang đến cho bạn trải nghiệm đặt phòng trực tuyến thuận tiện và tiết kiệm thời gian. Hãy đặt phòng ngay hôm nay để khám phá vẻ đẹp của Novotel Okinawa Naha và tận hưởng chuyến du lịch tuyệt vời của bạn!

Khám phá vùng Naha tại đảo Okinawa Main, Nhật Bản

Với vị trí tuyệt vời tại đảo Okinawa Main, Naha là một điểm đến hấp dẫn cho những ai muốn khám phá văn hóa và lịch sử độc đáo của Nhật Bản. Với nhiều điểm tham quan và hoạt động thú vị, du khách sẽ không bao giờ cảm thấy nhàm chán khi đến với thành phố này.

Naha nổi tiếng với hòn đảo Shuri, nơi có Cung điện Shuri, một di sản thế giới của UNESCO. Du khách có thể khám phá kiến trúc độc đáo của cung điện và tìm hiểu về lịch sử và văn hóa của vùng Okinawa. Ngoài ra, khu phố Heiwa-dori cũng là một điểm đến thú vị, với nhiều cửa hàng, nhà hàng và quán bar, tạo nên một bầu không khí sôi động và sôi đầy năng lượng.

Không chỉ có điểm tham quan lịch sử, Naha còn có bãi biển tuyệt đẹp như bãi biển Naminoue, nơi du khách có thể thư giãn và tận hưởng nắng, biển và cát trắng. Điều này tạo ra một sự kết hợp hoàn hảo giữa văn hóa, lịch sử và thiên nhiên tại Naha, Okinawa Main, Nhật Bản.

Cách di chuyển từ sân bay gần Okinawa Main island đến Novotel Okinawa Naha

Để đến Novotel Okinawa Naha từ sân bay gần Okinawa Main island, bạn có một số phương án di chuyển thuận tiện và dễ dàng.

Một phương án là sử dụng dịch vụ taxi. Từ sân bay, bạn có thể tìm đến các quầy taxi và yêu cầu đi đến Novotel Okinawa Naha. Đây là phương án tiện lợi và nhanh chóng, đặc biệt khi bạn có nhiều hành lý hoặc không muốn mất thời gian tìm hiểu các tuyến đường công cộng.

Ngoài ra, bạn cũng có thể sử dụng dịch vụ xe buýt từ sân bay đến Novotel Okinawa Naha. Các tuyến xe buýt công cộng có thể đưa bạn trực tiếp đến khách sạn hoặc gần đó. Hãy kiểm tra lịch trình và điểm dừng của các tuyến xe buýt để chọn phương án phù hợp với kế hoạch của bạn. Điều này cũng là một lựa chọn kinh tế và thuận tiện để khám phá vùng đất mới.

Khám phá những điểm tham quan xung quanh Novotel Okinawa Naha

Novotel Okinawa Naha nằm gần nhiều điểm tham quan nổi tiếng, mang đến cho du khách những trải nghiệm thú vị trong chuyến đi tới Okinawa Main. Một trong số đó là Tenbusu Naha, một tòa nhà lịch sử độc đáo với kiến trúc truyền thống và nhiều cửa hàng, nhà hàng phục vụ đặc sản địa phương. Du khách có thể thỏa sức mua sắm và khám phá văn hóa độc đáo của Okinawa tại đây.

Ngoài ra, cũng có sân vận động Okinawa Cellular Stadium, nơi diễn ra các trận đấu bóng đá và sự kiện thể thao đặc sắc. Du khách có thể tham gia cổ vũ cho đội bóng địa phương hoặc thưởng thức những trận đấu hấp dẫn. Nếu bạn muốn tìm hiểu về lịch sử và văn hóa của Okinawa, Tsushima-maru Memorial Museum là một điểm đến thú vị. Đây là nơi lưu giữ kỷ niệm về vụ chìm của tàu Tsushima-maru và mang đến cho du khách cái nhìn sâu sắc về thảm kịch lịch sử này.

Vị trí thuận tiện gần các ga tàu điện ngầm tại Novotel Okinawa Naha

Novotel Okinawa Naha là một khách sạn đẳng cấp nằm ở trung tâm thành phố Okinawa Main, Nhật Bản. Với vị trí thuận tiện gần nhiều ga tàu điện ngầm, du khách có thể dễ dàng di chuyển đến các điểm tham quan và khu vực lân cận.

Các ga tàu điện ngầm gần khách sạn bao gồm Yui Rail Gibo, Yui Rail Asahibashi, Yui Rail Shuri, Yui Rail Asato, Yui Rail Onoyama Koen, Yui Rail Miebashi, Yui Rail Kenchomae, Naha-kuko Railway và Oroku Monorail. Với sự thuận tiện này, du khách có thể dễ dàng khám phá các điểm đến phổ biến như Cung điện Shuri, Cầu Kokusai và Chợ Makishi.

Khách sạn cũng nằm gần ga tàu điện ngầm Prefectural Office, giúp du khách dễ dàng tiếp cận với các khu vực khác của thành phố Okinawa Main. Với các tuyến tàu điện ngầm này, việc di chuyển trong thành phố trở nên dễ dàng và tiết kiệm thời gian.

Những nhà hàng xung quanh Novotel Okinawa Naha

Novotel Okinawa Naha nằm gần nhiều nhà hàng nổi tiếng và đa dạng, đảm bảo sẽ đáp ứng mọi khẩu vị của du khách. Jack's Steak House là một lựa chọn tuyệt vời cho những ai thích thưởng thức thịt bò ngon. Yunangi và Ramen Danbo Naha Makishi Branch cung cấp các món ăn truyền thống Nhật Bản như mì ramen và mì soba. Sumanume và Shuri Soba là những nhà hàng phục vụ các món ăn độc đáo của vùng Okinawa. Piparchi Kitchen, Bacar Okinawa và Homemade Noodles Sanchikuju - Across Plaza Furujima Station cung cấp các món ăn đa dạng từ các nền văn hóa khác nhau. Cuối cùng, Hatomajima và Nono Budou Okinawa Cargoes đều nổi tiếng với các món ăn đặc sản của đảo Okinawa.

Những điểm mua sắm nổi tiếng xung quanh Novotel Okinawa Naha

Nằm ở vị trí thuận lợi, Novotel Okinawa Naha cho phép khách hàng dễ dàng tiếp cận đến các điểm mua sắm nổi tiếng trong khu vực. Pineapple House, Heiwa Dori Shopping Street và Miyagi Meat Naha Branch đều nằm trong khoảng cách đi bộ từ khách sạn. Du khách có thể tìm thấy những món đồ độc đáo và quà lưu niệm tại các cửa hàng này. Nếu bạn quan tâm đến nghệ thuật và văn hóa địa phương, Tsuboya Pottery Center và Shimabukuro Pottery là những địa điểm không thể bỏ qua. Ngoài ra, Inori Healing Shop cung cấp các sản phẩm chăm sóc sức khỏe và Nabbie Sanshin là nơi bạn có thể tìm hiểu về âm nhạc truyền thống Okinawa. Đừng quên ghé qua Ramayana Honten, Yacchi & Moon và Nouren Market để khám phá thêm các sản phẩm độc đáo và trải nghiệm văn hóa địa phương.

Giá trung bình của phòng tại Novotel Okinawa Naha so sánh với giá trung bình của phòng ở cùng thành phố

Với giá trung bình chỉ $93, Novotel Okinawa Naha là một lựa chọn tuyệt vời cho du khách đang tìm kiếm một kỳ nghỉ thoải mái và tiện nghi tại Okinawa Main island. So với giá trung bình của phòng khách sạn tại thành phố này là $121, giá của Novotel Okinawa Naha thực sự rất hợp lý và tiết kiệm. Với mức giá này, du khách có thể trải nghiệm không gian nghỉ dưỡng sang trọng và dịch vụ chất lượng cao mà không cần phải lo lắng về ngân sách.

Trải nghiệm tuyệt vời tại Novotel Okinawa Naha

Novotel Okinawa Naha là một điểm đến tuyệt vời cho những ai muốn có một kỳ nghỉ thú vị tại Okinawa Main island. Khách sạn này đã nhận được những đánh giá tích cực từ khách hàng với dịch vụ chào đón và phục vụ rất tận tâm. Phòng ở đây đủ rộng và thoải mái, mang lại trải nghiệm tuyệt vời cho du khách. Đặc biệt, bữa sáng tại đây thật ấn tượng với đa dạng các món ăn và đồ uống, đồng thời, chúng tôi còn bị ấn tượng bởi dịch vụ mang cà phê đến tận phòng. Đối với cặp đôi hoặc gia đình muốn tận hưởng kỳ nghỉ thư giãn tại Naha, chúng tôi rất khuyến khích lựa chọn Novotel Okinawa Naha. Phòng nghỉ và bể bơi vô cực tại đây đều rất tốt, mang lại cái nhìn tuyệt đẹp về Naha. Bể bơi cũng thật tuyệt vời. Bữa tối tại đây rất ngon, với nhiều món ăn hấp dẫn và sự phục vụ tuyệt vời từ quản lý và nhân viên khách sạn.

Đánh giá tích cực về Novotel Okinawa Naha - Khách sạn đẳng cấp tại đảo Okinawa

Novotel Okinawa Naha là một khách sạn đẳng cấp tại đảo Okinawa, Nhật Bản, với mức đánh giá tổng thể là 8.5 điểm. Khách sạn này được đánh giá cao về giá trị, cùng với điểm số 8.6 cho tiện nghi và 9.0 cho sự sạch sẽ. 

Với mức đánh giá 8.6 cho giá trị, khách sạn Novotel Okinawa Naha mang đến cho khách hàng một trải nghiệm tuyệt vời với giá trị tốt nhất cho tiền bỏ ra. Khách sạn cung cấp các dịch vụ và tiện nghi đẳng cấp, từ các phòng nghỉ sang trọng, nhà hàng chất lượng đến các tiện ích như hồ bơi, trung tâm thể dục và spa. Với mức giá hợp lý, khách sạn này đem đến cho khách hàng sự thoải mái và hài lòng vượt qua mong đợi.

Khách sạn Novotel Okinawa Naha cũng được đánh giá cao về sự sạch sẽ với điểm số 9.0. Khách sạn luôn duy trì môi trường sạch sẽ và gọn gàng, giúp khách hàng có trải nghiệm nghỉ ngơi thoải mái và an lành. Đội ngũ nhân viên của khách sạn cũng được đánh giá cao với điểm số 8.8 cho hiệu suất làm việc. Với sự chuyên nghiệp, nhiệt tình và thân thiện, nhân viên sẽ đảm bảo rằng khách hàng có một kỳ nghỉ đáng nhớ tại Novotel Okinawa Naha.

sample_comments.text:
Nhân viên thân thiện, hồ bơi rộng và có thể thưởng thức barbecue, đồ ăn đồ uống cũng khá rẻ so với các khách sạn ở khu vực khác. 
Chi phí taxi đến phố quốc tế khoảng 1000 yên. 
Phí đỗ xe 2000 yên cho một đêm thì hơi đáng tiếc. 
Cách âm có phần yếu.
sample_comments.title: Đây là một chỗ ở có giá trị tốt.
Stress free stay at Novotel Naha
sample_comments.positives:
I went on a solo vacation to Okinawa and chose Novotel Okinawa Naha as my place to stay. It had nice rooms, a gym (very important to me), parking and reasonable prices for lodging. The hotel has a nice cafe, a restaurant and a market for any small needs. The location was convenient and easy to access, use Google maps for directions!! The staff were ALL so helpful and accomodating. 1 young lady even took it upon herself to continue calling a restaurant to secure a reservation for me while I was out exploring the island. That is definitely above and beyond in my opinion because she didnt have to do that for me and I am thankful for her. There is also, in walking distance, a French chef tasting experience that was immaculate!!

I enjoyed my quiet stay and wouldnt hesitate to book there again in the future if needed!
sample_comments.negatives: The only reason I took away a point was because parking was listed as one price (which was a determining factor before I booked), but was a higher price when I checked in and I was not made aware of that change in advance.

sample_comments.title: Trên cả tuyệt vời
sample_comments.positives: We had deluxe rooms and they were spacious, clean and nicely decorated. The breakfast buffet was great. Away from the Main Street but conventionally located. Nice exercise room and pool. Erica at front desk made check-in easy and answered my questions.
sample_comments.negatives: Would have liked some dresser drawers and suitcase racks. Recycle trash can/bag in the room for cans and bottles.

sample_comments.text: ハイアットリージェンシー那覇のクラブラウンジを利用した事があり、期待し過ぎていたのかもしれないです。 値段はさほど変わらないけれど、個人的には満足度は低いです。ラウンジで大声で話していても誰も注意しないし、料理もぱっとしない印象です。 プールが素敵なので、小さい子供さん連れにはいいかもしれません。スタッフのサービスはもう少し頑張った方がいいかも。
sample_comments.title: まあまあ

sample_comments.text: Mặc dù tôi đã đi du lịch Nhật Bản vài lần nhưng chỗ ở lần này là tốt nhất. Những lần trước, chỗ ở quá chật chội khiến tôi không thể mở vali thoải mái, nhưng lần này tôi có thể bày đồ đạc khắp nơi mà không thấy phiền phức hay khó chịu. Tôi rất thích điều đó. Dù trời âm u nhưng tôi vẫn được chăm sóc nhiệt độ nước bể bơi rất chu đáo, nước nóng trong phòng cũng chảy ra mát lạnh, thật tuyệt vời. Việc phòng tắm và bồn rửa mặt tách biệt nhau cũng rất tiện lợi cho việc sử dụng. Nhân viên ở đây cũng rất thân thiện.

sample_comments.positives:

The food was also good.
The overall stay was very pleasant.
sample_comments.negatives: I think that the parking charges wasn't clearly mentioned in the web ,the daily parking charges was very high. Also ,even though we booked a room for a family of 4, we had to buy towels for the 2 children. I suggest that these things should be clearly mentioned during the booking..providing very clear information is highly appreciated.

sample_comments.title: Trên cả tuyệt vời
sample_comments.positives: We had deluxe rooms and they were spacious, clean and nicely decorated. The breakfast buffet was great. Away from the Main Street but conventionally located. Nice exercise room and pool. Erica at front desk made check-in easy and answered my questions.
sample_comments.negatives: Would have liked some dresser drawers and suitcase racks. Recycle trash can/bag in the room for cans and bottles.

sample_comments.text: 夕食のバイキングが良いです。メニューも豊富で、ホテルグレードを考慮しても安価です。わざわざ、ホテルの外まで行かなくても充分満足です。 　３６０度の景色を見渡せるホテル最上階のラウンジは、プレミアフロア以上のお客様のみ利用可能のようですが、夜景も綺麗で、お酒や、つまみも充実。多少高くても、プレミアフロア以上で、このラウンジが使えるならお得かも。リブランド前のホテルでは、回転するレストランとして使っていた場所だけに、とにかく眺望が良いです。またお世話になろうと思います。
sample_comments.title: 夕食バイキングがお勧め

sample_comments.text:
Chúng tôi đã sử dụng dịch vụ này trong chuyến đi với trẻ em lớn học tiểu học. 
Khách sạn rất sạch sẽ và thoải mái. 
Khách sạn nằm trên một ngọn đồi cách xa khu phố trung tâm Naha một chút, nhưng nếu có xe thuê thì việc di chuyển hoàn toàn không vấn đề gì. 
Nếu đi taxi, chỉ một chút là đã đến được khu phố trung tâm Naha. 
Xung quanh khách sạn, trong bán kính 10 phút đi bộ có rất nhiều cửa hàng để ăn uống. 

Chúng tôi đã có thời gian rất thoải mái tại khách sạn. 
Buffet sáng rất hài lòng!! 
Mỗi sáng chúng tôi ăn no nê. 
Có cả hồ bơi và cả trẻ em cũng rất vui khi được sử dụng nhiều lần trong thời gian rảnh giữa các chuyến tham quan. 

Chúng tôi đã có những kỷ niệm tuyệt vời.
sample_comments.title: Cảm ơn bạn đã chăm sóc trong 3 đêm liên tiếp.
Tuyệt vời
sample_comments.positives: Very nice and comfortable room with plenty of space. Very nice infinity pool enjoy the sun and views on Naha.

sample_comments.title: Not recommend if there is other choice
sample_comments.text: 1 location is not well

sample_comments.title: The staffs NOT that friendly - especially at the car-park area they pick & choose vehicles !
sample_comments.text: Rooms very small hardly can move around - twin bed very small, car parking - the staff there pick & choose the vehicles let them park at the most convenience area near to the entrance and out-side rented car park to the extreme base - open car park far distance away from the entrance door, the location far away from many shopping area too.

sample_comments.title: 服務細節不到位
sample_comments.text: 首先，大廳充滿柴油味，入住3天2夜都沒有任何改善。每天只提供2瓶水，即使我訂4人房，入住2大2小，依然只有2瓶，而且去櫃檯要也沒有，也沒有飲水機，櫃檯叫我們自己去全家便利商店買。入住時光確認我和家人的姓名，就花了一個多小時。沒有機場接送，地圖上雖然接近國際通，但是他們在山坡上，對於親子旅遊要移動，可能需要考慮開車或計程車。

sample_comments.title: Great high view But some employee need to be trained more
sample_comments.text:
It was great 1day in Novotel in shuri hill
We got a 12flour and It was awesome view for city side. Hotel bath amenity also great with perfume brand. And clean room. Pool is in third flour and infinity style but little small. Still good so far.

We ate dinner buffet and breakfast buffet in second flour.
Dinner was great tasty for almost every menu and definitely great attitude from manager and worker.

However, morning breakfast buffet is just Ok level. There is a lot of japanese or asian food (example Natto or chyawan mushi or okayu etc) It is ok testy. But not so many option for American style breakfast. 

On the other hand we was suggested to go out 10 minutes later on finishing time..... I never have that kind of experience from Hotel worker ...So me and my spouse was little shocked...

Anyway if you want clean new built in hotel definitely you could satisfied with this

sample_comments.title: Trap photos
sample_comments.text: The classic hotel with fantastic photos then the reality is completely different...the pool space seems gorgeous in the pics, it was completely empty with no chair or a place to sit or put your stuff. Just an empty space with a pool, sad. I didnt like the hotel in general.

sample_comments.title: It was ok
sample_comments.text: Small but clean
sample_comments.room_type: Deluxe Executive Room with 2 Single Beds - Non-Smoking, Lounge Access Included

sample_comments.title: Location no convenient
sample_comments.text: Car park is chargeable and location not convenient.

sample_comments.title: Good
sample_comments.text: The room I stayed and the infinity pool was good. But, the location is a bit far from Kokusai Street.

sample_comments.title: No frills hotel
sample_comments.text: Room is smaller than it looks on pictures but overall still a comfortable stay. You should have a car if you are staying here as ite located uphill and rather far from the main shopping street.

sample_comments.title: great
sample_comments.text: we had a great stay in this hotel. friendly staff and good breakfast. the only minus i noticed was they don't have cotton buds and a hair brush in the room. but the room is clean the sheets and pillows are clean.

sample_comments.title: It was a good experience.
sample_comments.positives:
It was nice and clean and the staff was very kind.
The food was also good.
The overall stay was very pleasant.
sample_comments.negatives: I think that the parking charges wasn't clearly mentioned in the web ,the daily parking charges was very high. Also ,even though we booked a room for a family of 4, we had to buy towels for the 2 children. I suggest that these things should be clearly mentioned during the booking..providing very clear information is highly appreciated.

sample_comments.title: Pleasant stay
sample_comments.text:
Overall a pleasant hotel to stay if you want to be close to Kokusai-Doori, with all the restaurants and shops. You'll be better off to rent a car if you want to go around in your own schedule, but Taxis would also be okay for short trips. 
I wouldn't say the rooms were spacious, and you can see the seasoned side of things in the ceilings and small areas of the room, but nothing that stands out that much.

sample_comments.title: Very good
sample_comments.negatives: there's not enough iphone charger. and the outdoor pool closes too early.

sample_comments.title: Cheap reservations with Agoda. Good for a stay-at-home getaway.
sample_comments.text: As mentioned in other reviews, the dust in the coin laundry is quite something. However, you can check the usage conditions on the TV, so it's fine if you're not concerned about that. The thin walls might not be a problem if you don't mind them. It might be because it's not a premium floor, but you can hear the snoring and coughing from the neighboring room. As for the location, it's said to be one taxi meter away from Kokusai Street, but you can get to the other side for about 1300 yen. The aroma around the elevator hall is quite strong. There is a FamilyMart convenience store open until 24:00. There is no water in the room, so you have to go to the elevator hall's server to fill up. Breakfast can be quite crowded, and sometimes the manners of other customers can be off-putting, but it's relatively tasty. I think I will use it again. It's close to Shuri Castle, and I like it!

sample_comments.title: Bad
sample_comments.text:
Parking fee needed even staying, refrigerator was too loud...I couldn't sleep well at all.
I never stay at the hotel

sample_comments.title: Very good
sample_comments.text: Pool was nice. Otherwise fairly ordinary, partly because of Covid restrictions.

sample_comments.title: The toilet
sample_comments.text: Clean room , but the toilet in facilities is not good Bcoz always clogged I hope the staff give attention on this

sample_comments.title: Not bad 4 out of 5
sample_comments.text:
Pretty much nothing around the area except for Shuri Castle.

Great service with a convenience store within the hotel, so that's a big plus.

sample_comments.title: Very good
sample_comments.text: I stayed for two nights this time, and the staff's response was good and comfortable. The breakfast was also delicious, allowing me to enjoy the taste of Okinawa in the morning. It's convenient that I could check the usage status of the coin laundry from the room's TV. However, the location is somewhat inconvenient for transportation without a car. I didn't use the pool this time due to the season, but the lighting was beautiful, and I definitely want to use it next time.

sample_comments.title: Comfortable room, near to Shuri castle and Kokusai shopping street
sample_comments.text: Comfortable room but small toilet. Relatively near to Share Castle(20mins walk) and Kokusai shopping street(10mins taxi ride). Great facilities include Family Mart and coin operated laundry and drying machines in the hotel.
sample_comments.room_type: Executive Twin Room - Non-Smoking, Lounge Access Included

sample_comments.title: A hotel that is appreciated by those traveling with children.
sample_comments.text: There was a space for children to play and a pool, which made it comfortable for them to play in the heat! The location of the hotel was a bit difficult to find, and the road in front of Shuri is one-way at certain times, so caution is needed. The food was delicious and offered good value for money.

sample_comments.title: Safe even with children.
sample_comments.text:
A kid's room equipped for families with small children was available, which was great. There were also picture books, but most of them were in Korean.

The infinity pool had both adult and children's sections, which was helpful.

This time, we were upgraded to a premium floor on the top floor by the hotel service, and the room was slightly larger than planned, which made our stay comfortable. I would love to stay again if the opportunity arises. Thank you!

sample_comments.title: I enjoyed the pool and the kids' room.
sample_comments.text: I used the pool after arriving. There were two types, one for adults and one for children, so my 2-year-old was able to play comfortably. Next to the pool, there were separate changing rooms for men and women, as well as a machine to inflate floaties, which was helpful. The staff were also friendly and kind, and we had a pleasant time.

sample_comments.title: Good for quick stay
sample_comments.text: Breakfast is pretty good and easy access to various locations across Okinawa

sample_comments.title: It depends on the mode of transportation.
sample_comments.text: I didn't know that Okinawa was such a hilly town, and I regretted walking on the first day. The taxi service was surprisingly friendly and inexpensive. The bus also made it easy to move around while checking the schedules from this hotel to reduce waiting time. Exiting from the back gave me a local feel, and I had a great stay.

sample_comments.title: Nice stay. Good for the money
sample_comments.positives: Pool was nice, with the infinity thing, however it was a bit too shallow at only 1m. Good having a Family Mart store in the lobby.
sample_comments.negatives: Hotel smelled a bit. Bathrooms very tight

sample_comments.title: Average Stay - Feb 2025
sample_comments.text:
Stayed at Novotel Okinawa for 3 nights. I had previously stayed in Novotel Bangkok and Singapore so I am expecting a high standard for this stay however below are the items I felt could be done much better.

- The bed was slightly hard, didn't manage to have a very good rest.
- Family Mart is located within the hotel however it closes at 12 midnight and there isn't any vending machine for drinks or food within or outside the hotel premises.
- The flush button for the toilet bowl is located at the back which is slightly inconvenient to reach.
- We were directed to park at P2,3,4 despite the available parking slots at P1. P3 and P4 areas were further away from the hotel and there was a slope upwards from the carpark to the hotel which made it inconvenient to drag luggage up. We only know when reach there.

sample_comments.title: Very good
sample_comments.positives: Convenient location to point of interest
sample_comments.negatives: Paying for parking, when spending this amount on a room it should be included. No body lotion in the room? Short hours of premiere lounge, would not have booked more expensive room had i known.

sample_comments.title: Kids Friendly Hotel
sample_comments.text: Overall we like the hotel. It's clean, helpful staffs, and kids friendly. I wish the hours during the cocktails hours with kids are longer but overall is fine.
sample_comments.room_type: Deluxe Executive Room with 2 Single Beds - Non-Smoking, Lounge Access Included

sample_comments.title: Very good
sample_comments.positives: Location and amenities.
sample_comments.negatives: Toilet paper quality was lacking.

sample_comments.title: Excellent hospitality.
sample_comments.text: When I checked in, I found traces of the previous guest left in the room, which was a bit unpleasant, but the hotel's staff were very good in every instance, so I felt it was okay to stay again. On my last business trip, I stayed at Loisir, but the service, quality of the guests, the room's mattress, and the view from the window were all better at Novotel. Thank you for a comfortable stay!

sample_comments.title: I had an overall good stay.
sample_comments.positives: Breakfast was very good. Lots of local food and variety of food and beverages. The location was ideal for nearby historic places. The room was cleaned and amenities replaces every day once I wasn't in the room. The staff were very helpful and polite.
sample_comments.negatives: Not being able to make local calls from my room was disappointing. The bed could've been one king size bed instead of to 2 twin size beds joined together. The room had a slight odor, don't know if it was the carpet or because the ac was off upon entering the room. Room service would've been nice to have. It would've been nice if the hotel had sent me a happy birthday card in my room seeing that my purpose of being there was to celebrate my birthday. Some acknowledgment would've made me feel special as other hotels normally do and seeing that it was my 1st time there.

sample_comments.title: Good cost performance.
sample_comments.text:
We stayed for four nights with toddlers and elementary school children at a hotel close to my parents' house. This was the first time using it since it became a foreign-affiliated hotel. The interior has improved since the days of the Mito Hotel, and the room amenities were new, making it comfortable to stay. 

Although there is no large public bath, there is a pool with a good view, which the children enjoyed. Since it is located in a residential area, the view from the pool is somewhat of a home-view, but you can see the unadorned town of Naha. 

The breakfast was neither particularly good nor bad, but there were a few Okinawan dishes available. If you go outside and walk up the hill toward Shuri, there are famous places to eat Okinawa soba and Ryukyu cuisine. The hotel is close to a bus stop, with a convenience store on the first floor and a coin laundry and gym on the third floor, making it convenient to use. 

It was a cost-effective hotel that was easy to stay at even with children.

sample_comments.title: Very good
sample_comments.text:
I stayed in Novotel for 10 days. I've had a great time. My twin room was spacious and clean. The buffet breakfast was delicious with plenty of options to choose from. The hotel has nice a nice Japanese restaurant. The pool wasn't functional because of the cold weather but I could still sit by the poolside and enjoy the view. The staff was kind and helpful. 
It's definitely worth staying!

sample_comments.title: Convenience Store next to receptiom
sample_comments.text: ...was the highlight. Great pool, buffet breakfast, pool, the views...difficult to fault the hotel. Staff polite and helpful too.

sample_comments.title: Pool
sample_comments.text: It was a bit cold since I went in spring, but the pool was really nice. There were both a shallow pool and a deep pool. The staff were friendly, and there were convenience stores and lounges within the hotel, making it very convenient! It might be a bit inconvenient if you don't have a car.
sample_comments.room_type: Deluxe Executive Room with 2 Single Beds - Non-Smoking, Lounge Access Included

sample_comments.title: Excellent
sample_comments.text: もっと泊ってもいいくらい、ゆっくりとできる空間でした。

sample_comments.title: Perfect for elementary school children and their parents.
sample_comments.text:
- Close to the airport
- Parking service
An additional charge of 1500 yen/day separate from the accommodation fee is a downside.
- Access to Kokusai Street is excellent
- Convenience store within the hotel is great
- Laundry facilities within the hotel
It's great to see the usage status of the washing machine and dryer from the room. The dryer gets particularly crowded after 8 PM, but one unit was out of order, which is a downside.
- Breakfast buffet is excellent
There may be a wait starting around 7:30, so those planning to join a tour in the morning should go to the venue early.
- Bath is a unit bath
The partition between the toilet and bath is only halfway, so my first-grade son made the toilet side wet when taking a bath.
- Pool is great

sample_comments.title: Child's first trip
sample_comments.text: I stayed with my 0-year-old child. Since it was our first trip, I was a bit anxious, but they provided a sturdy crib, which reassured me. There was also a children's pool where we had fun playing. The location is fine if you have a car, but walking from the monorail was somewhat difficult due to sudden rain (we rented a car from the second day onward). Everyone was courteous, and the breakfast was delicious, making it a wonderful memory!

sample_comments.title: A place that is very satisfactory for the price.
sample_comments.text: This is a great value accommodation. The staff is very friendly. The cleanliness of the room is excellent. Although the accessibility to the city center is a bit lacking, the view is great. I was disappointed that the pool water was cold. The breakfast is very excellent. I highly recommend trying it at least once. Overall, it was a very satisfying stay.

sample_comments.title: A perfect hotel for a solo trip during the rainy season.
sample_comments.text:
I visited alone during the height of the rainy season. On the first day, there was heavy rain equivalent to a warning level, so I spent the day quietly in the hotel. My single room on the 5th floor, on the opposite side of the pool, did not have a good view, but overall, the hotel was comfortable and easy to stay in. If you are going to stay at this hotel, I think it would be better to splurge a little and get a twin room or opt for a plan that includes lounge access.

On the second day, it was clear and many people enjoyed the pool from the morning.

The breakfast was also satisfactory with a variety of options available.

sample_comments.title: Family trip
sample_comments.text: We used it for a family trip. The space was ample for two semi-doubles and two singles, but it felt narrow as there were no sofas or similar furnishings. It was a pity that the package did not allow us to use the upper floor, so we couldn't enjoy the lounge. The staff was kind and helpful.

sample_comments.title: Vacation with lounge access.
sample_comments.text:
I had been curious about the cost performance of the lounge and finally got to visit. Since it was a weekday, the cost performance was really good. The facilities were very clean and had a sense of cleanliness, with a design that felt like a foreign hotel. The staff members were elegant and kind.

It might be a bit unsatisfying to only have dinner at the lounge, but being able to drink free alcohol with snacks in that location was fantastic!

It's a bit of a distance to the station, but it's walkable and there's a bus, so I will use it again when I go to Okinawa!
sample_comments.room_type: Executive Twin Room - Non-Smoking, Lounge Access Included

sample_comments.title: Group trip (single room)
sample_comments.text: It was a group setting, but since I preferred a single room, it was somewhat more expensive, but I was able to relax. When the two of us opened our suitcases, the space was of average size. Since it was on a high ground, the view was nice. The scent of the amenities' shampoo, conditioner, and body soap was subtle and coconut-like, which I liked. The breakfast was also abundant with Okinawan dishes, which was great. It was disappointing that there was only one type of dessert, though.

sample_comments.title: Great staff, good food, okay location, substandard gym.
sample_comments.text: The foreign staff were exceptionally friendly and helpful. The lobby food was good but the staff didn't seem to like us very much. The restaurant was closed on the two days we wanted to try it. There weren't that many good places to eat within walking distance. The gym was fine if you just want 20 minutes of cardio. The pool looked nice but it was always packed. The room and bath were clean and roomy. If you are renting a car and traveling around the island this is a good place to stay.

sample_comments.title: The staff members are wonderful.
sample_comments.text:
I stayed for the first time for three nights and four days. Since I went out every day, I mostly just used it for sleeping, but the staff's response was truly wonderful!

However, there were a few concerns regarding the facilities that I hope can be improved to make for an even better stay.

Positive points:

- Daily cleaning was done
- All amenities were available
- The bed and pillows were the best
 * The pillows were so good that I wanted to get one for my home
- The shower pressure was excellent
- When the parking lot was full, I could leave my keys with the staff at the entrance, and they would retrieve the car for me in the morning
- I lost my phone in the car or the room, and after searching everywhere, it wasn't found, but when I returned, it was placed on the bed!
 * This was truly a lifesaver! Thank you so much to the housekeeping staff!

Some disappointing points:
There was a strange, indescribable smell like oil throughout the front desk and the basement, which I found very unpleasant. The floors and rooms had no smell in particular, but I wonder what that was...

When parking the rental car on the hotel building side, water sometimes splashes down from above, possibly from the pool. I was really surprised at first, and when it splashed onto another parked car, I was a bit worried it would dent the roof.

It seems that the area between the toilet tank and the toilet seat lid hasn't been cleaned for quite a while, as it was black with dust and hair. I understand that it's a hard-to-clean spot, but since it's visible when I stand and brush my teeth, I would appreciate it if it could be cleaned!

Since my room didn't have a balcony, I thought it would have been nice to have a foldable indoor drying rack for hanging swimsuits and towels in the bathroom at night.

sample_comments.title: Excellent
sample_comments.text:
The hotel is nice, the stay wasn't long so I can't really say much. 
The rooms are quite small which is not a shocker for Japan but for couples room it was really small. 
It's a decent distance to and from the airport which is good.

sample_comments.title: Base for sightseeing in Okinawa City
sample_comments.text:
The interior of the facility was clean, and it was nice to experience a resort feeling even in the city. 

I am not sure how to access it other than by car from the airport, but from where we parked the car, Shuri Castle Park is within walking distance, and you can take the monorail from Shuri to Kokusai-dori. With a little effort, you can also walk back from there.

However, the parking fees are a bit concerning as they are higher than the maximum fees for nearby hourly parking lots. Nevertheless, the breakfast is good, and the various services are generally well-designed and friendly. Overall, I think the satisfaction level is quite high.

sample_comments.title: Recommended for Shuri Castle sightseeing.
sample_comments.text: Access from public transportation is poor, but it takes about 15 minutes to walk to Shuri Castle. The infinity pool was a lot of fun for the kids. It was nice to have a convenience store nearby as well. I felt that the restaurant in the lobby was a bit overpriced, but it was delicious. The cost performance was excellent.

sample_comments.title: I came solo
sample_comments.text: I came and stay solo

sample_comments.title: A stay in Okinawa one rank higher.
sample_comments.text: The room with a nice view is spacious, allowing for easy unpacking of luggage. It's not a difficult distance to walk to Kokusai Street. This time, I used a rental car for the hotel, and the valet parking allowed for easy drop-off and pick-up at the hotel's front entrance, making it convenient.

sample_comments.title: Comfortable
sample_comments.text: The room was spacious, allowing me to open my suitcase widely, making it very comfortable to stay! I would like to go again.

sample_comments.title: Good service.
sample_comments.text:
I was very happy with the service. Good facilities. Very clean. 
But the best part for me was the elevator, very fast but I could feel it starting moving up and down or when it's stopping.

sample_comments.title: Stress free stay at Novotel Naha
sample_comments.positives:
I went on a solo vacation to Okinawa and chose Novotel Okinawa Naha as my place to stay. It had nice rooms, a gym (very important to me), parking and reasonable prices for lodging. The hotel has a nice cafe, a restaurant and a market for any small needs. The location was convenient and easy to access, use Google maps for directions!! The staff were ALL so helpful and accomodating. 1 young lady even took it upon herself to continue calling a restaurant to secure a reservation for me while I was out exploring the island. That is definitely above and beyond in my opinion because she didnt have to do that for me and I am thankful for her. There is also, in walking distance, a French chef tasting experience that was immaculate!!

I enjoyed my quiet stay and wouldnt hesitate to book there again in the future if needed!
sample_comments.negatives: The only reason I took away a point was because parking was listed as one price (which was a determining factor before I booked), but was a higher price when I checked in and I was not made aware of that change in advance.

sample_comments.title: It's very good, but a little bit惜しい‼
sample_comments.text:
The room was spacious, and there were amenities like an infinity pool and a gym, making it very enjoyable. The staff was also very kind and accommodating. Although it was a great hotel, I was a bit concerned about some mold in the bathroom. Additionally, it was disappointing that the refrigerator wasn't very cool. 

Overall, it was definitely a hotel I would like to stay at again.

sample_comments.title: Excellent
sample_comments.positives: Very nice and comfortable room with plenty of space. Very nice infinity pool enjoy the sun and views on Naha.

sample_comments.title: It's great for family trips.
sample_comments.text: I was disappointed that I couldn't use the swimming pool, but the breakfast was neat for the price and the room size was good, not too small. However, I was a bit disappointed that the location wasn't in a busy area. Still, it was convenient to have a convenience store nearby.

sample_comments.title: Beautiful Hotel with great staff and a beautiful pool in a good location if you have a car.
sample_comments.positives: It is a beautiful hotel with great breakfast and facilities- staff is friendly and we had a 5 month old baby with us and everyone was really helpful.
sample_comments.negatives: Maybe that the meals are a little overpriced

sample_comments.title: Hotel with a pool located in the city.
sample_comments.text:
The hotel is about 2 kilometers away from Kokusai Street and is located on a hill, so it may be difficult to walk there. (Public buses from Kokusai Street arrive at the hotel.) 

There are no convenience stores nearby, but there is a FamilyMart inside the hotel, so you can find most of what you need. It is advisable to buy anything that is not available at the convenience store before checking in. (It is a little less than a kilometer walk to the nearest drugstore on the hill.) 

The rooms are kept very clean. Since there is no curtain in the bathroom, the toilet area may get wet easily. (There is a simple partition.) Additionally, the refrigerator only has enough functionality to keep things cool, so it would be better if it could chill a little more. 

However, despite that, the pool at this hotel is fantastic! In addition to offering a view of Naha city, it is heated, allowing for swimming even at night in reasonable temperatures. There are plenty of towels available for pool use, and changing rooms and showers are also provided, so there is no need to go back to the room. 

Couples were also using the pool, but for families with children like ours, having a place for unique leisure activities was greatly appreciated.

sample_comments.title: I want to go.
sample_comments.text: Every year I go to Okinawa, and this time I thought of taking it easy, so I decided to stay at the Novotel a bit away from Naha International Street. The night swimming was nice, and it's great for taking pictures! The staff were friendly, and the room condition was good. The breakfast was also neat and delicious. I am interested in going again next time~~

sample_comments.title: Closer location to center
sample_comments.text: It's a nice place to stay with family.

sample_comments.title: This is a cost-effective accommodation.
sample_comments.text:
The staff is friendly, the pool is spacious, you can enjoy barbecues, and compared to hotels in other areas, food and drinks are relatively inexpensive. 
The taxi fare to the international street is about 1,000 yen. 
The parking fee of 2,000 yen per night is a bit disappointing. 
Soundproofing is somewhat lacking.

sample_comments.title: 周辺のお店も楽しいです
sample_comments.text: I stayed with my sister's family on a trip. I was grateful that we could spend time without worrying even with small children around. The cafe on the first floor had delicious cakes and dishes. The staff were also pleasant, and it was a very comfortable hotel.

sample_comments.title: Both the breakfast and the pool are great!
sample_comments.text: Since it wasn't a rental car, I walked from the nearest Yui Rail Asato Station, so it was a bit of a distance, but the hotel was clean, breakfast was delicious, and it was really great that the pool was open from morning until night! The kids were also very happy. I would love to stay there in the summer someday. Thank you very much.

sample_comments.title: I was able to spend time with peace of mind.
sample_comments.text: I was able to spend time without any stress from check-in. The staff's responses were concise and smart, and in a good way, simple, allowing me to relax without any concerns. Breakfast was included, and the variety was abundant, meeting our expectations and satisfying the whole family.

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.text: We stayed there for four nights and it was worth it. The staff was friendly and helpful, the facilities are nice and there's a family mart inside which is convenient for everyone in case you need urgent.

sample_comments.title: Nice hotel
sample_comments.text:
環境不錯，有充足車位，但洗手間內枱面及掛衣位置不足，有點不便。

整體來說是舒適和乾淨的。

sample_comments.title: Very comfortable and child-friendly
sample_comments.text:
Our booking included breakfast and we can use all the facilities of the hotel .. including swimming pool, kid club, tea time, happy hour ... the staff is so nice and friendly to kids. Breakfast is good also. 

Just the room is a little bit small for us ...(2 adult 2 kids)
sample_comments.room_type: Executive Twin Room - Non-Smoking, Lounge Access Included

sample_comments.title: The lounge use was comfortable.
sample_comments.text:
I chose this hotel because I wanted to use the premier lounge. It seems that the nearby Hilton does not have a lounge. As the sun was setting, at the premier lounge on the 15th floor of the hotel located on the high ground of Naha, I spent a blissful moment without cigarette smoke, gently swaying my glass while talking with my long-time partner. 

If I come to Naha again, I would like to use it once more.
sample_comments.room_type: Executive Twin Room - Non-Smoking, Lounge Access Included

sample_comments.title: Overall very ideal.
sample_comments.text:
High cost-performance ratio, hotel parking ¥1500 per night. 
The hotel room has ample space and the environment is clean, but the air conditioning system is not very good. 
The restaurant has sufficient facilities for children and good service. 
The number of elevators is adequate, and the swimming pool is also quite nice.

sample_comments.title: Great Nice Clean & Delicious Breakfast
sample_comments.text: Great hotel, comfortable rooms with delicious breakfast and the convinience store at the first floor is easy for us to find snacks and dinner at nite.

sample_comments.title: Hotels recommended for families with children.
sample_comments.text: The facility was very clean and well-maintained. The staff were also very friendly, and even though I was with children, we were able to have a comfortable time. There are amenities like a pool and a kids' room, so you won't get bored. There is a FamilyMart inside the facility as well, which was reassuring.

sample_comments.title: The scenery is amazing!
sample_comments.text: I have traveled to Naha about ten times and stayed in various hotels, but the night view was the best! It is a bit far from the Yui Rail station, but there is a bus stop right in front, so I didn't find it inconvenient. Additionally, the parking lot is large, making it convenient if you rent a car. From the breakfast venue's window, you can overlook Naha city, and the spacious area allowed me to enjoy breakfast leisurely. I felt that the walls were a bit thin, but the bathroom was clean, there were no unpleasant odors in the room, and it was comfortable. I would like to use it again when I go to Naha.

sample_comments.title: I used it for an anniversary.
sample_comments.text: I rented a car to visit, and the guidance for the car was very kind and courteous from the start. The hotel had various facilities that were attractive, but it was a pity that I didn't have time to use them because I enjoyed Okinawa too much. Next time, I would like to take my time and enjoy the hotel as well. I was expecting the view from the room to be beautiful, but it was somewhat disappointing. All the staff, especially the cleaning staff, greeted me warmly, allowing me to have a wonderful morning. I also used the lunch buffet, which was very delicious, and I ended up eating too much! I definitely want to use it again.

sample_comments.title: Nice place to stay
sample_comments.text: Clean, close to bus stops

sample_comments.title: Nice staffs, very good services, Cafe is very cozy
sample_comments.text: Very warm welcome and services. The location is okay near to Shuri Castle. The hotel accommodation should cover parking fee, charging extra 1,000 yen per night might not sound appropriated.

sample_comments.title: Excellent
sample_comments.text: The location is a bit far from the city centre and could is only accesible by car. Although there is a family mart at the lobby, the products inside should be refilled more frequently.

sample_comments.title: Nice hotel but expensive parking
sample_comments.text:
If you're not on a budget, loved a good view from a 3rd flr pool, a clean room to sleep in and loved a good breakfast, we highly recommend this hotel. 

And if you have a car, they charge 2000 yen per night which we find a bit expensive than what other hotels offer since we're only parking for the night and goes out in the day. There are no other pay parking options.

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives: I really enjoy going to this hotel. The food is lovely, the staff are kind and the facilities are clean and welcoming. Especially the premiere lounge! Love it! The room designs are cool as well and spacious.

sample_comments.title: Great Breakfast but expensive parking
sample_comments.text:
If you're not on a budget, loved a good view from a 3rd flr pool, a clean room to sleep in and loved a good breakfast, we highly recommend this hotel. 

The only downside is if you have a car - they charge 2000 yen per night which we find a bit expensive than what other hotels offer since we're only parking for the night and goes out in the day. There are no other pay parking options nearby.

Overall, we still love our stay here and would recommend it for families.

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.text:
思っていた以上に良かった〜
国際通りも近いし
地元居酒屋も色々あって大満足

sample_comments.title: Spacious room
sample_comments.text: I have traveled to Japan several times, but this accommodation was the best. Previously, the places were so cramped that it was uncomfortable to open my bags, but here I could spread my things around without feeling bothered or uncomfortable at all. The pool was available even though it was cloudy, and they took great care of the water temperature. The hot water in the room also worked really well, which was great. It was very convenient to have the bathroom and the sink in separate areas. All the staff were very friendly as well.

sample_comments.title: Use during honeymoon trip.
sample_comments.text: This time, we stayed for two nights and three days on our honeymoon, and the hotel was very kind to families with lots of luggage, as they meticulously sterilized baby bottles and arranged taxis for us! Although the variety of breakfast options felt limited, it was delicious, and I would like to go again.

sample_comments.title: Simple, clean and well equipped
sample_comments.text: It had everything we needed, and smelled clean all the time. This place is clearly well taken care of. The breakfast is very good, they have a restaurant and the bus stop is right nearby the entrance. They also have a family mart inside the building for convenience, a bistro and a dinner restaurant.

sample_comments.title: It was a perfect stay.
sample_comments.text: I was worried that I wouldn't be able to enjoy my time in Okinawa because of the rain, but thanks to this hotel, I had a wonderful time. The staff were very kind, the lounge view was great, and all the food was delicious. I am truly grateful to the staff who welcomed me warmly, and this is a hotel I would like to visit again.
sample_comments.room_type: Executive Twin Room - Non-Smoking, Lounge Access Included

sample_comments.title: Thank you for taking care of me during my three-night stay.
sample_comments.text:
We used this hotel for our trip with elementary school-aged children. It was very clean and comfortable. The hotel is located on a hill a bit away from the bustling streets of Naha, but having a rental car made mobility completely hassle-free. Even taking a taxi, you can reach the bustling area of Naha in no time. There are also plenty of restaurants within a 10-minute walk around the hotel.

We had a very comfortable stay at the hotel. The breakfast buffet was very satisfying! We ate until we were full every morning. The pool was also available, and during our free time after sightseeing, the kids were thrilled to use it multiple times.

We made wonderful memories.

sample_comments.title: Spacious and Comfortable
sample_comments.text: A very comfortable and family-friendly stay at Novotel. The room size stood out immediately! Kids loved the pool. Overall, a reliable choice for families looking for comfort, space, and convenience.

sample_comments.title: Excellent breakfast
sample_comments.text: Excellent breakfast with a wide variety of Western and Asian dishes, breathtaking pool overlooking Naha, small fitness room. The hotel is located slightly outside the city center.

sample_comments.title: It's good to go with children.
sample_comments.text: I had a great time with my two kids at the rooftop pool on the third floor. Considering the price including breakfast, the value for money was good, and the breakfast was tasty. Everything was great except for the slightly awkward location.

sample_comments.title: The pool is the best!
sample_comments.text: The location is great, and it's very nice to be able to jump into the pool as soon as I wake up! The lighting at night is also very pleasant, and I really enjoyed using it! The hotel staff kindly handled the in-and-out of the rental car for me! I had dinner at the Japanese food and teppanyaki restaurant "Toki," and it was reasonably priced and delicious! I would love to stay again.

sample_comments.title: The room is tidy, and the bathroom has a wet and dry separation.
sample_comments.text: The room space is spacious and the environment is clean. A complete set of independently packaged skincare products is provided. The lounge offers nuts and refreshments at different times. Very sincere. The staff are friendly and polite. The location is on the mountain, more suitable for those driving. Thank you to all the hotel staff for their care these few days; I would stay again if given the chance.
sample_comments.room_type: Deluxe Executive Room with 2 Single Beds - Non-Smoking, Lounge Access Included

sample_comments.title: The ultimate value for money.
sample_comments.text: I stayed for two nights in an executive twin room from July 24 to 26. I highly recommend it. It's far from Kokusai Street and close to Shuri Castle, but it's the best hotel, not a resort. The room is spacious and the facilities are very good. Above all, all the staff are friendly, and their responses are attentive and quick. Breakfast in the executive lounge is served in the restaurant on the second floor, and the food during cocktail hour is good enough to consider as a full meal. It costs about 800 to 1000 yen for a taxi one way to Kokusai Street, which is definitely worth it~^^ The pool is also excellent. The bathroom in the guest room is narrow, typical of Japanese hotels, which is a bit disappointing, but cleanliness deserves a 5-star rating~~ Don't hesitate^0^
sample_comments.room_type: Executive Twin Room - Non-Smoking, Lounge Access Included

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.text: Very clean for sure. The pool was great!

sample_comments.title: Best cost performance.
sample_comments.text: It was a hotel with excellent cost performance. However, I think the house staff should be more aware that they are being seen by customers while working, even though I understand they are busy. When loud work conversations happen in the hallway, it dampens the travel mood.
sample_comments.room_type: Executive Twin Room - Non-Smoking, Lounge Access Included

sample_comments.title: Great view from Infinity pool
sample_comments.text:
I love the view from infinity pool.
And the good standard of hotel breakfast. 
There are USB chargers from head of bed, that is convenient enough 
Check out time is 11am, which is later than other hotels we stayed in Okinawa

They charged 1500 yen for parking. It will be great if they can offer free parking.

sample_comments.title: relax
sample_comments.positives: la picona la recepción
sample_comments.negatives: nada

sample_comments.title: 직원이 최고!!!
sample_comments.text: 노보텔 전 숙소 열쇠를 가지고 와서, 노보텔 패밀리마트 택배서비스를 이용하여 전 숙소에 보냈습니다. 프론트 직원의 도움으로 주소도 적었고, 전화도 해서 마무리 지었습니다. 친절한 직원이 아니었다면 많이 힘들었을꺼예요. 무인숙소 열쇠 꼭 반납하시고 오세요^o^

sample_comments.title: Novotel review
sample_comments.text: Stayed at Novotel Okinawa for 4 nights. We enjoyed our stay there and will choose to stay here again. Room was very spacious compared to the standard ones along kokusai, perfect for family with kids. There is also a play room for those with young kids. Location is slightly off but it doesn't really matter if you are driving.

sample_comments.title: Comfortable stay
sample_comments.text: It was January, so I was able to stay at a great price. I stayed in a standard twin room, which was clean and comfortable in terms of space and facilities. It was also nice to have a Nespresso machine in the room, allowing me to enjoy delicious coffee. I would like to use this place again if I have the opportunity.

sample_comments.title: Hôtel bien situé et abordable
sample_comments.positives:
La chambre donnait sur la piscine.
c'était très agréable de se lever avec une vue dégagée sur la ville et la piscine.

sample_comments.title: The price-performance ratio is good for the price^^
sample_comments.text: It's in Naha, but there's a distance to International Street. I couldn't walk to International Street while staying here. Breakfast is delicious, make sure to try it. If you're lucky, there might be kimchi sometimes, hehe. I stayed for two nights, and one of those days there was kimchi, hehe. Looking for kimchi means the food is delicious, but it can be a bit greasy, hehe. If you usually have meals without kimchi, then pass~! hehe. The infinity pool is not a heated pool, just so you know. However, if you're going to swim intensively, it's manageable, hehe. But for those traveling with a rental car, it's in the middle of Naha, making it easy to access the highway, and it's convenient to go to Aeon Mall, Don Quijote, and American Village. I recommend the location (but this is for those who like driving). I've been trained for long drives, so that was an advantage for me. The driver's seat is on the right, and driving on the left side is difficult, though, hehe. I'm leaving after a good rest. If I visit Okinawa again, I will use this place again^^

sample_comments.title: Exceptionnel
sample_comments.positives: tout était parfait
sample_comments.negatives: Rien

sample_comments.title: Great deal
sample_comments.text: New hotel, great pool and friendly staff

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.text: スタッフさんもみなさん優しく、モーニングも利用しましたがとても種類が豊富でおいしかったです！ホテル内にはコンビニがありますが、近くにお店は無いです。絶対にタクシーで行くことをお勧めします！

sample_comments.title: Das Novotel Okinawa Naha war für den Preis in Ordnung. Ich würde jederzeit wieder buchen
sample_comments.positives:
Ich hatte das Zimmer mit Frühstück gebucht. Das Frühstücksbüffet war groß und vielseitig. 
Das Zimmer war in Ordnung. Ich hatte es als Einzelzimmer gebucht. Für eine Person war gut Platz.
Es standen ein Zimmersafe, ein kleiner Kühlschrank, eine Kaffeemaschine (mit Kaffeekapseln, Milchpulver- & Zuckertütchen) und ein Wasserkocher zur Verfügung.
Im Haus waren Waschmaschinen und Wäschetrockner gegen Bezahlung verfügbar.
Es gab eine Sonnenterrasse mit Schwimmbecken.
Das Personal war freundlich und hilfsbereit.
sample_comments.negatives:
Es gab nur einen kleinen Kleiderschrank mit wenigen Kleiderbügeln und zwei Schubfächern. Ein Fach war durch den Zimmersafe belegt, das andere durch Schlafkleidung). Wäsche zum Trocknen (gewaschen oder verschwitzt) konnte nicht aufgehängt werden (im Bad gab es eine kleine Wandhalterung für Handtücher aber nicht ausreichend). Da die Trockner die Wäsche nicht ganz trockneten musste diese mit Kleiderbügeln an einer Brüstung noch aufgehängt werden.
Die Klimaanlage war etwas laut.

sample_comments.title: Good
sample_comments.text: It's good to stay here over night , we had a good experience lived here

sample_comments.title: Excellent
sample_comments.positives: Das Zimmer lag direkt in Richtung Straße, trotzdem war es nie laut. Frühstück war immer sehr umfangreich und gut.

sample_comments.title: nice room and breakfast
sample_comments.text:
the room size is good enough and comfortable.
breakfast is impressive that have a wide variety of foods and drinks
we are also impressed by their 'coffee take away' set right next to the restaurant.

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.text: I definitely recommended this hotel, so very nice

sample_comments.title: Really enjoyed our stay!
sample_comments.text: We chose the Novotel as a spot to spend a few days before heading up to Onna. It was a great spot-rooms clean, amazing staff, excellent service. We booked a premier room with lounge access and was pleasantly surprised that this meant breakfast, and premier lounge including cocktail hour was included. Huge value for money and made our stay a little bit more special. Enjoyed the pool facilities and great to have a family mart inside the facilities for kids snacks. We walked to the monorail, and castle. And the staff were great - Mann who was new there was amazing, as was Roda who couldn't do enough to help me. Thanks so much!
sample_comments.room_type: Executive Twin Room - Non-Smoking, Lounge Access Included

sample_comments.title: Davvero consigliato!!
sample_comments.positives:
L'albergo è nuovo, le camere ristrutturate e ben tenute.
Lo standard di pulizia è buono, la colazione ricca e varia.
La gentilezza e la disponibilità dello staff hanno reso il soggiorno perfetto.
Davvero consigliato!!
sample_comments.negatives:
Se proprio va fatto un suggerimento: per la cena le uniche proposte sono il ristorante bbq e il bar della struttura, entrambi con ultimo ordine alle 21 ed il primo con posti limitatissimi.
In ogni caso Naha offre tantissimi ristoranti, anche nelle vicinanze.

sample_comments.title: Good stay
sample_comments.text: Staff are helpful. The barbecue is fabulous. Definitely worth the money.

sample_comments.title: Heerlijk hotel, fijne zwembaden, eigen strand en grote kamers.
sample_comments.positives: Heerlijk hotel!! Fijne zwembaden, het eigen strand is een enorm pluspunt. We hebben hier 4 hele fijne nachten gehad. En zeezicht kamers gekregen terwijl ik het niet geboekt had was een leuke verrassing. Ruime kamers en grote badkamer. Dikke aanrader!

sample_comments.title: The pool was lovely.
sample_comments.text: The night pool was especially lovely and was open late, so we were able to enjoy it after returning from our sightseeing. The breakfast buffet changed slightly every day, making it enjoyable without getting boring. The gym, which was open 24 hours, also felt like a nice little experience.

sample_comments.title: If you are staying in Shuri, this is the place.
sample_comments.text: I have stayed here several times, and since it often gets fully booked, I was glad to be able to stay this time. There were no towels for the children sleeping in the same bed in the room as per the number of beds, but they quickly prepared them at the front desk. The children said they were disappointed that they couldn't play in the pool because it's winter, but the breakfast was delicious.

sample_comments.title: Ambiance
sample_comments.text: The Ambiance is way too good with an exceptional service. It's a place to revisit. But something has to be done with the floor 360 views, it has to be free for the hotel clients/customers.

sample_comments.title: Healing solo trip!
sample_comments.text: I was surprised that the staff took care of my car even before I entered the front desk! From there, the front staff was incredibly polite and I was very satisfied! Additionally, there was a fitness gym, a coin laundry, and it was well-equipped in terms of healthcare! The highlight was enjoying a solo cafe in a hammock at the gourmet bar! Eating tiramisu while having coffee, it was an elegant moment! Everything was excellent! I want to stay again!

sample_comments.title: Perfect accommodation experience!
sample_comments.text: The hot water and swimming pool were well maintained, allowing for a comfortable stay, and the view from the spacious room was excellent. The transportation was also very convenient, making it easy to get around, and the staff's attitude was friendly and helpful. Overall, the cleanliness was outstanding, and everything was satisfactory.

sample_comments.title: Very good
sample_comments.positives: O Hotel em geral é muito bom. As atendentes do gourmet bar sao muito simpaticas e educadas. A piscina muito boa e linda. Os quartos com cafe para fazer na hora tambem muito bom. Muitas comodidades que nao precisamos nos preocupar em sair do hotel. Como combini, lavanderia, academia, piscina, gourmet bar.
sample_comments.negatives:
O que nao gostei no hotel é que por servum hotel com piscina o quarto deveria ter mais lugares para pendurar roupas de piscina e boias tipo de colete. Nao tinha muito lugar para pendurar roupas molhadas mesmo usando a centrifuga da area da piscina. A roupa de piscina ainda ficava umida e nao dava para ficar o dia todo na fila da lavanderia que tambem é um ponto que pelo tamanho do hotel o tanto de hospedes que cabem a lavanderia deveria ser maior. 
Os restaurantes de dentro do hotel sao muito caros. E uma coisa que foi constragedora, o hotel deveria informar no momento da reserva que o lounge do 15 andar so pode ser frequentado por quem esta hospedaddo mos andares prime que fica no 11 ao 13. Fui ver como era o 15 andar e quando cheguei la a moça muito educada disse. Me desculpe mas aqui so pode comer quem esta hospedado no prime floor.

sample_comments.title: Amazing experience!
sample_comments.text: My stay there was so comfortable and smooth. The staff was very helpful and the facilities are incredible!

sample_comments.title: Great Lounge and nice little Swimming Pool
sample_comments.text: The hotel is very clean, recommend to get lounge access.
sample_comments.room_type: Executive Twin Room - Non-Smoking, Lounge Access Included

sample_comments.title: It was very good.
sample_comments.text: We stayed for three nights as a group of three, and the room cleaning was done beautifully every day. The pool was also comfortable, and we played in it every day! It's about a 25-minute walk to Kokusai Street, and it cost 900 yen for a taxi for the three of us, so I think the location is good.

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.text: Beautiful hotel and amazing view from the executive lounge, nice swimming pool.The staff is very professional and help6.
sample_comments.room_type: Executive Twin Room - Non-Smoking, Lounge Access Included

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.text: Perfect family stay. The staffs are great and accessble

sample_comments.title: The room is comfortable, clean, and new, and the staff are very friendly.
sample_comments.text: I stayed for five days and it felt very good; I was reluctant to leave. It's very suitable for self-driving travel. There are several parking spots that charge 1500 yen per day. At night, many cars return to the hotel, and there are staff members directing the parking spaces. Inside the hotel, there is a Family Mart, which is very convenient and has basic supplies. The pool, although not large, is beautiful and very clean. There are two distilled water machines outside the floors, which is very convenient. The family room accommodates four people and is excellent; the room is clean, new, spacious, and comfortable enough for several suitcases. I will definitely recommend it to friends, and I will choose to stay here again when I go to Okinawa next time.

sample_comments.title: Overall, I was satisfied with my stay.
sample_comments.text: Everyone at the front desk and the staff were kind and treated us with great care. The pool was also equipped with towels, which was wonderful. All the breakfast items were delicious. I would like to stay again.

sample_comments.title: Best buffet breakfast
sample_comments.text: Clean and great buffet breakfast!

sample_comments.title: The staff's response is polite and kind.
sample_comments.text: This is my third year staying at Novotel! I'm very satisfied! The staff at the front desk and the café on the first floor were very polite and kind, which made my stay comfortable. The room was spacious, clean, and beautiful. There is also a pool and gym on the third floor, and the view from the pool is great! I would like to use it again when I come to Okinawa.

sample_comments.title: I want to use it again.
sample_comments.text: I used it as a surprise, and I had a really comfortable time. I will use it again when I go to Okinawa.
sample_comments.room_type: Deluxe Executive Room with 2 Single Beds - Non-Smoking, Lounge Access Included

sample_comments.title: Amazing!
sample_comments.text: I loved my stay at Novotel, such a beautiful and clean hotel! The pool is amazing, and the staff are so kind. I can't way to stay again!

sample_comments.title: It was very nice.
sample_comments.text: It was a bit away from Kokusai Street, but since we had rented a car, we were able to get there quite quickly. The hotel had a pool, and we could borrow floaties for free, which the kids enjoyed. Thank you very much. I would love to stay at this hotel again if I get the chance.

sample_comments.title: A hotel where you can spend your time with peace of mind.
sample_comments.text:
We stayed for three nights with four family members. The room was clean and had a nice sense of cleanliness, allowing us to spend our time comfortably. It was also nice to have a gym, convenience store, and coin laundry available.

The kids enjoyed playing in the pool on the third floor, while the parents were able to relax by the poolside.

The staff's service was also good!

We would like to stay again!!

sample_comments.title: うるさいホテル
sample_comments.negatives: 隣人の声、アラーム音が鳴り響いて寝れないなどの不快で最悪でした。

sample_comments.title: 3-day, 2-night trip to Naha.
sample_comments.text: It was a very beautiful guest room, and the cleaning was thorough in every corner, making for a very comfortable few days! I would like to use it again!

sample_comments.title: Hotel review
sample_comments.text: Everything was great - facilities, cleanliness and even an executive club lounge access was included for a price of $70 SGD per night. Only downside was that I found the room slightly small

sample_comments.title: 楽しむことができた
sample_comments.text: スタッフの対応も良く気持ち良く滞在できました。

sample_comments.title: Girls' trip
sample_comments.text: There is Shuri Castle within walking distance, and I was able to enjoy sightseeing. Also, on the day of departure, it was raining, and I was at the entrance wondering what to do when a staff member from the front desk who had helped me earlier came specifically to assist me. They were really kind and accommodating. Thank you very much! I appreciate the thoughtful hospitality. When I come to Naha in the future, I will recommend this hotel to my friends. Thank you again! ^_^

sample_comments.title: If you are going to Shuri Castle
sample_comments.text: A hotel located in a rich area where you can enjoy walking around the Shuri town. The views from the lounge and infinity pool terrace were lovely. The rooms feel compact and smaller compared to resort hotels, but the shower pressure was strong enough to enjoy even on the 13th floor. Regarding lounge usage hours for guests, I felt that it would have been more luxurious if there had been a time to enjoy coffee while taking in the views from the top floor between breakfast and checkout at 11 AM. I hope it can be used from 8 AM to 11 AM. I also think it would be nice if checkout could be done in the lounge.
sample_comments.room_type: Deluxe Executive Room with 2 Single Beds - Non-Smoking, Lounge Access Included

sample_comments.title: Beautiful view and good food
sample_comments.text: My wife and I were able to work in the lobby restaurant and the food teas excellent. My daughter loved the pool.

sample_comments.title: good

sample_comments.positives:
ラウンジ付きの部屋の雰囲気がよかった。
スタッフの方々がとても親切で良い印象でした。
sample_comments.negatives:

一階トイレの劣化が目立ち、掃除が行き届いてはいなかった。ごみ、ホコリ等。とても残念。

朝食時間が7時からなので、人が殺到して落ち着かない感じでした。6時からにしてほしいです。

sample_comments.title: ちょっと残念です

sample_comments.negatives: 洗面所が掃除の途中のような状態でチェックインさせられました。ゴミ箱のふちに前の方が使ったと思われるコンタクトレンズが貼りついたままでした。あまり使ってない場所は拭き掃除もしていない感じであのお値段はガッカリしました。

sample_comments.title: Surprised by the abundance of services.
sample_comments.text: I was surprised to find a light meal and drink service in the lounge right after checking in. There were drinks ranging from soft drinks to alcohol, and the whole family was very satisfied. The pool was not too deep, so even my elementary school-aged child was able to enjoy it. Being located on a hill also provided a great view.
sample_comments.room_type: Executive Twin Room - Non-Smoking, Lounge Access Included

sample_comments.title: Acceptable
sample_comments.positives: インフィニティープールからの眺めは凄く良かったです。
sample_comments.negatives:
駐車が出来るのか2日前に電話で確認し、ロータリーまで来てくれたらとの説明。
当日、ロータリーに着いて荷物を降ろしてる間に声かけもなく、助手席を開け運転席まで身を乗り出し車内をじっくり観察？
これにはまず驚きました。
受付時に駐車料金の説明ない。
日本語が聞き取りにくい他国のスタッフ。何度も聞き返しました
不安になり、部屋からネットで駐車料金を検索したら1000円と記載されていたので
チェックアウト時に支払うんだろうと思ってはいたのですが、実質1500円でした。　
値段が変わった風な1言、雨の中、濡れながら車に乗る状態に悲しい思いでした。

sample_comments.title: Good Pool
sample_comments.text: Totally clean, huge and perfect temperature. They give you a big towel.
